title: bassia prostrata subsp. grisea
intro: Bassia prostrata subsp. grisea, also known as crested hairgrass, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Amaranthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bassia prostrata subsp. grisea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
